name: La Shawn K. Ford
bio: La Shawn K. Ford is listed as a Democratic candidate in IL-07's 2026 congressional primary. He has served in the Illinois House and entered the open race after Rep. Danny Davis retired. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: ~$495K raised as of Feb 25, 2026 (FEC). FEC ID: H6IL07354

career_history.highlight: 17 years in the Illinois House; chairs Appropriations subcommittees

policy_platform.position: Advocates for school funding reform and expanded vocational training.
Supported SAFE-T Act provisions; advocates for pre-trial reform and anti-recidivism programs.
Focuses on West Side Chicago economic investment and small business support.

social_pulse.summary: Low national profile but solid West Side Chicago presence. Moderate positive sentiment among constituents. No major social media controversies.

trust_indicators.label: No major ethics violations on record
